name: What's the deadline to file after slipping at work in Sandy UT?

mainEntity.name: What's the deadline to file after slipping at work in Sandy UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Notify employer in 180 days, file claim in 1 year in Utah.
acceptedAnswer.description: In Utah, notify your employer within 180 days and file a formal claim (Form 12) with the Labor Commission within 1 year of the injury date. Missing these triggers denial risks, though late filings may be accepted with good cause[6]. Key factors: Date of injury or discovery starts clock; minors get extensions. Document notification immediately via email or certified mail. If symptoms delayed, consult attorney to argue timely discovery. Act fast to preserve evidence.

description: Notify employer in 180 days, file claim in 1 year in Utah.
